_meta.description: Signal registry — permanent catalog of every tracked signal across all ingestion pipelines. Signal IDs are immutable once created. Add new signals; never rename or delete. layer: 1 = per-chart data signal (algorithmically computed), 2 = cross-chart synthesis (authored per period from data), 3 = lending ecosystem expert model (generated ~6-monthly, strict claim validation).

sibc.name: RBI Sector/Industry-wise Bank Credit
sibc.description: Outstanding bank credit by sector, industry size, services sub-sector, personal loans, priority sector

atm_pos.name: RBI ATM/POS Card Statistics
atm_pos.description: Credit/debit card outstanding, POS/ATM/QR transaction volumes and infrastructure counts

domains.credit_growth: Credit expansion — sector acceleration, new highs, positive trend breaks
domains.credit_stress: Credit contraction, deceleration, stress proxies, policy-driven decline
domains.market_structure: Market share shifts, bank-type competition, concentration, new entrants
domains.infrastructure: ATM, POS, QR code deployment, utilisation, digital acceptance infrastructure
domains.policy: PSL, regulatory mandates, RBI policy effects, PSLC trading, PLI schemes
domains.data_quality: Methodological gaps, reclassifications, double-counting, opacity in source data
domains.cross_pipeline: Signals that require data from more than one ingestion source to interpret
domains.credit_headline: System-level bank credit — total volume, YoY growth, breadth across sectors
domains.sector_mix: Main sector composition — Agriculture, Industry, Services, Personal Loans: YoY and share
domains.industry: Industry credit detail — by size (Micro/Small/Medium/Large) and by type (all industry segments)
domains.retail: Personal loans detail — Housing, Gold, Credit Cards, Vehicle, Education: YoY and share
domains.psl: Priority sector lending — Agriculture, MSME, Housing, Renewable Energy: YoY growth
domains.cards_stock: Cards outstanding — credit and debit card counts by issuer category
domains.credit_card_txn: Credit card transaction flows — POS, ecommerce, ATM withdrawal: value and channel mix
domains.debit_card_txn: Debit card transaction flows — ATM cash, POS, ecommerce: value and channel mix
